## Iodm.plugin() method

Registers a plugin to be applied to all models created after the plugin is registered.

**Signature:**

```typescript
plugin(fn: PluginFn<any, any, any, any, any>, opt?: any): void;
```

## Parameters

</th><th>

fn


</td><td>

[PluginFn](./iodm.pluginfn.md)<!-- -->&lt;any, any, any, any, any&gt;


</td><td>

The plugin function to be registered. This function will be called with the schema of each model created after the plugin is registered.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

opt


</td><td>

any


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Optional options to be passed to the plugin function when it is called.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

void
